title: Bodycam Modpack
description: This modpack adds a bodycam effect including a few other things to make an interesting fps. Also, if you do download this make sure to press F1 to remove the tacz gun from the gun you're focusing on, you're meant to actually have to try to aim.
body: The Bodycam modpack is meant to replicate the effects from the hyper-realistic game titled bodycam. There are a few other quality of life mods that alow you to add shaders, better animations for non-modded animals (better animations does not come pre-installed), new animmals to hunt, and player animations that fit with the weapon mod in the modpack. I made this so other people could enjoy an experiance with guns that feel realistic but blocky whilst also requiring skill to use. A disclaimer, always remember there are certain flaws that I cannot fix, like how the game spawns you in without removing the HUD. That means you must press F1 in order to play what I have intended for you to play. Another thing to mention is that certain guns require you to crouch in order to aim better.
